'''thavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palaeoclimatically|palaeoclimatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palaeoclimatically|palaeoclimatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thavate|thavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thavatesher|thavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatesherĂ«m|thavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thavatero|thavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thavateshĂ«|thavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavateshĂ«m|thavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithavatero|gokithavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithavateshĂ«|gokithavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavateshĂ«m|gokithavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothavankerom|gothavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothavankeshĂ«|gothavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavankeshĂ«m|gothavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothavankeya|gothavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thavaterom|thavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavatemu|thavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thavateya|thavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithavaterom|gokithavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavatemu|gokithavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithavateya|gokithavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thavavate|thavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thavavatesher|thavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavavatesherĂ«m|thavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thavavatero|thavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thavavateshĂ«|thavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavavateshĂ«m|thavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithavavatero|gokithavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithavavateshĂ«|gokithavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavavateshĂ«m|gokithavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothavavankerom|gothavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothavavankeshĂ«|gothavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavavankeshĂ«m|gothavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothavavankeya|gothavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thavavaterom|thavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavavatemu|thavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thavavateya|thavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithavavaterom|gokithavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavavatemu|gokithavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithavavateya|gokithavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠte|thĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠtesher|thĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠtero|thĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠtero|gokithĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠterom|thĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠtemu|thĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠvĂŠteya|thĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠterom|gokithĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠvĂŠteya|gokithĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafvafte|thafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafvaftesher|thafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafvaftesherĂ«m|thafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafvaftero|thafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafvafteshĂ«|thafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafvafteshĂ«m|thafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafvaftero|gokithafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafvafteshĂ«|gokithafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafvafteshĂ«m|gokithafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafvafnkerom|gothafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafvafnkeshĂ«|gothafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafvafnkeshĂ«m|gothafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafvafnkeya|gothafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafvafterom|thafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafvaftemu|thafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafvafteya|thafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafvafterom|gokithafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafvaftemu|gokithafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafvafteya|gokithafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
